positive: A central, highly stylized celestial creature blending into a geometric, vibrant mandala pattern. The creature should resemble a mythical stylized fox or celestial wolf, rendered in stark, elegant silhouette and linework. It is surrounded by intricate astronomical motifs: stylized constellations, crescent moons, stylized nebulae bursts, and abstract cosmic dust formations. Use a highly limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, luminous gold, and clean black. The overall style must be reminiscent of modern Japanese Ukiyo-e meeting Art Nouveau sacred geometry. Composition must be perfectly circular and highly scalable for apparel printing. Central subject is clear and powerful, with strong outlines and negative space contrast. Minimal gradient use; emphasize sharp lines and graphic elements.
negative: blurry, messy, low detail, noise, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, fuzzy, gradient, photographic, realistic photography
